common.unlock_desc: You've completed the free trial! Sign in with Google to continue your math journey and compete on the leaderboard.
common.tagline: Sharpen Your Mind. Test Your IQ.
common.free_hint: First 5 questions are free. Sign in for unlimited access.

notifications.welcome_body: Glad to have you with us, {name}. Let's solve some math!
notifications.daily_body: Hey {name}, ready to test your IQ today?
notifications.test_body: This is a test notification for MathIQ!
notifications.permission_message: MathIQ needs permission to send you daily challenges and updates.

settings.signout_confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
settings.delete_confirm_msg: Are you sure? This will permanently delete your score, rank, and all data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.delete_error: Could not delete account. Please try signing in again first.

quiz.completed_all: You have completed all available questions!
